codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 2205070 and found the implementation aligned with the dashboard interaction contract: Rotate Keyset wiring was added in settings, clear-credentials now hands off to Welcome no-profiles for demo-to-real transitions, and dedicated tests cover VAL-DSH-030..034 plus VAL-CROSS-008..013.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature metadata expects Recover navigation while settings are open, but the contract/tests validate Recover from the dashboard header. The worker followed the contract behavior but did not explicitly log this feature-metadata mismatch in discoveredIssues.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/78b31ed8-f90b-4b78-a67f-c8ed021439db/features.json:1211 and src/screens/__tests__/DashboardInteractions.test.tsx:344-350; ui-builder SKILL.md requires documenting contract-vs-feature conflicts.

summary: Handoff, transcript skeleton, and diff were reviewed; the feature is contract-compliant with no blocking regressions identified.
